series_metadata.series_description: Includes records on licenses of individuals or establishments (i.e., Auction Markets and Concentration Yards) that are engaged in the business of buying and selling livestock pursuant to ORC 943. Records include bonding information, inspections, license applications, suspensions, and status.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper for 3 years OR retain paper until scanned and verified as readable. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
